response: Emily divides the 24 residents into 4 groups since each group holds 6 people. Each of these 4 groups receives 3 initial prompts which totals 12 prompts. The 10 extra prompts are shared equally among the 4 groups adding 2.5 prompts per group in theory but for the total count we simply add the 10 to the 12. The total number of writing prompts needed is 22. This activity uses the library of ideas to inspire creativity. The library of stories grows with every new prompt shared. The END.
